title: BEM-618 live hourly trigger
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

workflow=wfs/'curator-hourly-report.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Curator Hourly Report

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 * * * *'
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'
      - 'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py'
      - 'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
      - '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: curator-hourly-report
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  curator-hourly-report:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check hourly scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Render canonical hourly report
        run: python3 scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py

      - name: Send Telegram hourly report
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          if [ ! -s governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt ]; then
            echo "not_sent_empty_message" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
          elif [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text@governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record delivery status
        run: python3 scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Commit hourly report state
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-618 curator hourly report runtime"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

trigger=triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-618 trigger live curator hourly report 2026-05-18 | 06:50 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'CURATOR_HOURLY_REPORT_LIVE_TRIGGER.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-618 | Curator Hourly Report Live Trigger'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'The only allowed scheduled workflow `curator-hourly-report.yml` also has a controlled push trigger for `governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger` so the new canonical report can be tested immediately.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem618_trigger_live_curator_hourly_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-618 | Trigger Live Curator Hourly Report | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Added controlled push trigger to curator-hourly-report.yml and committed trigger marker for live delivery test.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem618_trigger_live_curator_hourly_report','cycle_id':'bem618-trigger-live-curator-hourly-report','source':'gpt_executor_reserve','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:50 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        state={}
state['bem618_trigger_live_curator_hourly_report']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None}
state['hourly_report_template_flow']='live_trigger_committed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:50 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem618_trigger_live_curator_hourly_report.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-618 PASS: curator-hourly-report live trigger committed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(workflow),str(trigger),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Added controlled push trigger to curator-hourly-report.yml and committed live trigger marker')
"""
No issue comments.
